user_goal: B046 可交易 diff（mark-to-market）+ current_weight + regime reconcile（真实评分基础 Batch 3；里程碑 C 交易闭环关键拼图，backlog order 1）— 让『按系统指示交易』的 ticket 买卖 diff 真实准确。**Explore 关键发现**：可交易的 diff 不在 recommendations，在 execution get_position_diff()——它已算 current_weight 但用 持股×avg_cost 成本价/total_equity，成本价低估涨幅持仓权重→ticket 过度买入。真正修法=execution diff 改 mark-to-market。决策（★用户批）：①交易 diff 范围=★execution diff 改 mark-to-market（PriceProvider 最新收盘）+ rec 展示 current_weight 一致（两处复用 home.py B037 模式）；②★regime reconcile 纳入 B046（注册表对齐 master 实际 4-sleeve，验下游不破）。planner 决：NAV/估值基准=market-value（持仓×最新收盘）分子分母一致，不混成本/市价；avg_cost 保留（wash-sale/cost-basis 依赖，仅改权重/diff 估值不动记账）。3 features：(F001 g)共享 mark-to-market 助手+execution get_position_diff 改市价(核心可交易 diff)+recommendations 展示 current_weight+边界+pytest(B023 工作流/wash-sale 不破)；(F002 g)strategies 注册表对齐 master 实际 4-sleeve(加 momentum/hk_china，regime 留研究态)+验下游 home/advisor/news/strategies 不破；(F003 c)L1+L2 ticket diff mark-to-market 准确+rec current_weight 真实+注册表对齐+B023 工作流不破+signoff。永久硬边界继承：no-broker/no-execution(只出 ticket 指示用户手动下单)/B023 工作流不破(wash-sale/gate/cost-basis avg_cost 依赖不破)/定位 §1.1 不出收益预测/§12.10.2 请求路径禁 trade。不做：执行/下单/broker 能力/删 avg_cost/改 wash-sale/激活 regime(留 B013)/HK-China 实现(order3)/交易闭环冒烟(BL-B023-S1 order2)/改 master 评分/B044-B045 precompute/前端 Rec UI 结构。后续 backlog order：BL-B023-S1 闭环冒烟(order2,用本批真实 diff)→HK-China(order3)→B042 Risk UI→B043 AI 解释。
